insight: CMI's Alias module (com.Zrips.CMI.Modules.Alias.onPreprocessCommand, verified in Zrips/CMI-API) handles command shortcuts like /broadcast in PlayerCommandPreprocessEvent at EventPriority.LOW, executes them and cancels the event. Any command-blocking feature listening at HIGHEST with ignoreCancelled=true never fires for these. Blocking checks must run at LOWEST priority to fire before CMI.
